    46→function getCaptionText(altText: string, caption?: string): string | undefined {
    47→  if (caption) return caption
    48→  if (!altText) return undefined
    49→  if (altText.startsWith('!') || altText.startsWith('¡')) {
    50→    return altText.slice(1)
    51→  }
    52→  return undefined
    53→}
    54→
    55→function isSafeImageSrc(src: string): boolean {
    56→  return !/^(?:javascript\s*:|vbscript\s*:|data\s*:(?!image\/))/i.test(src)
    57→}
    58→
    59→function loadImageByUrl(
    60→  src: string,
    61→): Promise<{ width: number; height: number }> {
    62→  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    63→    const image = new Image()
    64→    image.onload = () => {
    65→      resolve({
    66→        width: image.naturalWidth || image.width,
    67→        height: image.naturalHeight || image.height,
    68→      })
    69→    }
    70→    image.onerror = () => reject(new Error('Image load failed'))
    71→    image.src = src
    72→  })
    73→}
    74→
    75→function readAsDataUrl(file: File): Promise<string> {
    76→  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    77→    const reader = new FileReader()
    78→    reader.onload = () => resolve(String(reader.result))
    79→    reader.onerror = () => reject(reader.error ?? new Error('File read failed'))
    80→    reader.readAsDataURL(file)
    81→  })
    82→}
    83→
    84→export function ImageEditRenderer(props: ImageRendererProps) {

   594→  replaceUrl,
   595→  onReplaceUrlChange,
   596→  replacePreview,
   597→  replaceError,
   598→  replaceLoading,
   599→  replaceModeItems,
   600→  fileInputRef,
   601→  onPickFile,
   602→  onFileChange,
   603→  onPreviewUrl,
   604→  onApplyReplace,
   605→}: {
   606→  replaceMode: ReplaceMode
   607→  onReplaceModeChange: (value: ReplaceMode) => void
   608→  replaceUrl: string
   609→  onReplaceUrlChange: (value: string) => void
   610→  replacePreview: string | null
   611→  replaceError: string | null
   612→  replaceLoading: boolean
   613→  replaceModeItems: Array<{ value: ReplaceMode; label: string }>
   614→  fileInputRef: RefObject<HTMLInputElement | null>
   615→  onPickFile: () => void
   616→  onFileChange: (file: File | null) => void
   617→  onPreviewUrl: () => void
   618→  onApplyReplace: () => void
   619→}) {
   620→  return (
   621→    <>
   622→      <SegmentedControl
   623→        items={replaceModeItems}
   624→        value={replaceMode}
   625→        onChange={onReplaceModeChange}
   626→        fullWidth
   627→      />
   628→
   629→      {replaceMode === 'upload' ? (
   630→        <>
   631→          <input
   632→            ref={fileInputRef}
   633→            type="file"
   634→            accept="image/*"
   635→            style={{ display: 'none' }}
   636→            onChange={(event) => {
   637→              const file = event.currentTarget.files?.[0] ?? null
   638→              void onFileChange(file)
   639→              event.currentTarget.value = ''
   640→            }}
   641→          />
   642→          <button
   643→            type="button"
   644→            className={`${styles.replaceUploadArea} ${styles.semanticClassNames.replaceUploadArea}`}
   645→            onClick={onPickFile}
   646→          >
   647→            {replaceLoading ? (
   648→              <>
   649→                <Loader2 size={16} />
   650→                <span>Uploading image...</span>
   651→              </>
   652→            ) : (
   653→              <>
   654→                <Upload size={16} />
   655→                <span>Click to upload image</span>
   656→              </>
   657→            )}
   658→          </button>
   659→        </>
   660→      ) : (
   661→        <>
   662→          <div
   663→            className={`${styles.editField} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editField}`}
   664→          >
   665→            <ImageIcon
   666→              className={`${styles.editFieldIcon} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editFieldIcon}`}
   667→              size={14}
   668→            />
   669→            <input
   670→              className={`${styles.editInput} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editInput}`}
   671→              type="url"
   672→              value={replaceUrl}
   673→              onChange={(event) => onReplaceUrlChange(event.target.value)}
   674→              onKeyDown={(event) => {
   675→                if (event.key === 'Enter') {
   676→                  event.preventDefault()
   677→                  onPreviewUrl()
   678→                }
   679→              }}
   680→              placeholder="https://example.com/image.jpg"
   681→            />
   682→          </div>
   683→          <div
   684→            className={`${styles.editActions} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editActions}`}
   685→          >
   686→            <button
   687→              className={`${styles.editActionButton} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editActionButton}`}
   688→              type="button"
   689→              disabled={replaceLoading || !replaceUrl.trim()}
   690→              onClick={onPreviewUrl}
   691→            >
   692→              Preview
   693→            </button>
   694→            <button
   695→              className={`${styles.editActionButton} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editActionButton} ${styles.editActionButtonEnd} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editActionButtonEnd}`}
   696→              type="button"
   697→              disabled={!replacePreview}
   698→              onClick={onApplyReplace}
   699→            >
   700→              Apply
   701→            </button>
   702→          </div>
   703→        </>
   704→      )}
   705→
   706→      {replaceError && (
   707→        <span
   708→          className={`${styles.panelHint} ${styles.semanticClassNames.panelHint}`}
   709→        >
   710→          {replaceError}
   711→        </span>
   712→      )}
   713→
   714→      {replacePreview && (
   715→        <div
   716→          className={`${styles.replacePreview} ${styles.semanticClassNames.replacePreview}`}
   717→        >
   718→          <img src={replacePreview} alt="Replace preview" />
   719→        </div>
   720→      )}
   721→    </>
   722→  )
   723→}
   724→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-renderer-image/src/ImageRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import 'react-photo-view/dist/react-photo-view.css'
     2→
     3→import { decodeThumbHash, type ImageRendererProps } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     4→import type { ComponentType, CSSProperties } from 'react'
     5→import { useMemo, useState } from 'react'
     6→import { PhotoProvider, PhotoView } from 'react-photo-view'
     7→
     8→import * as styles from './styles.css'
     9→
    10→type ImageLoadState = 'loading' | 'loaded' | 'error'
    11→
    12→const frameStateSemanticClass: Record<ImageLoadState, string> = {
    13→  loading: styles.semanticClassNames.frameLoading,
    14→  loaded: styles.semanticClassNames.frameLoaded,
    15→  error: styles.semanticClassNames.frameError,
    16→}
    17→
    18→function getCaptionText(altText: string, caption?: string): string | undefined {
    19→  if (caption) return caption
    20→  if (!altText) return undefined
    21→  if (altText.startsWith('!') || altText.startsWith('¡')) {
    22→    return altText.slice(1)
    23→  }
    24→  return undefined
    25→}
    26→
    27→export const ImageRenderer: ComponentType<ImageRendererProps> = ({
    28→  src,
    29→  altText,
    30→  width,
    31→  height,
    32→  caption,
    33→  thumbhash,
    34→  accent,
    35→}) => {
    36→  const [state, setState] = useState<ImageLoadState>('loading')
    37→
    38→  const captionText = useMemo(
    39→    () => getCaptionText(altText, caption),
    40→    [altText, caption],
    41→  )
    42→
    43→  const placeholderUrl = useMemo(
    44→    () => (thumbhash ? decodeThumbHash(thumbhash) : undefined),
    45→    [thumbhash],
    46→  )
    47→
    48→  if (!src) return null
    49→
    50→  const frameStyle: CSSProperties = {
    51→    backgroundColor: !placeholderUrl ? accent || '#f5f5f5' : undefined,
    52→    backgroundImage:
    53→      placeholderUrl && state !== 'loaded'
    54→        ? `url(${placeholderUrl})`
    55→        : undefined,
    56→    backgroundSize: 'cover',
    57→    width: width ? Math.min(width, 1200) : undefined,
    58→    maxWidth: '100%',
    59→    ...(width && height ? { aspectRatio: `${width} / ${height}` } : {}),
    60→  }
    61→
    62→  return (
    63→    <figure className={`${styles.root} ${styles.semanticClassNames.root}`}>
    64→      <PhotoProvider photoClosable>
    65→        <PhotoView src={src}>
    66→          <div
    67→            className={`${styles.frame} ${styles.semanticClassNames.frame} ${styles.imageState[state]} ${frameStateSemanticClass[state]}`.trim()}
    68→            style={frameStyle}
    69→            role="button"
    70→            tabIndex={0}
    71→            aria-label={`Open image: ${altText || 'image'}`}
    72→            onKeyDown={(e) => {
    73→              if (e.key !== 'Enter' && e.key !== ' ') return
    74→              e.preventDefault()
    75→              e.currentTarget.click()
    76→            }}
    77→          >
    78→            <img
    79→              src={src}
    80→              alt={altText}
    81→              width={width}
    82→              height={height}
    83→              loading="lazy"
    84→              className={`${styles.image} ${styles.semanticClassNames.image}`}
    85→              onLoad={() => setState('loaded')}
    86→              onError={() => setState('error')}
    87→            />
    88→
    89→            {state === 'loading' && (
    90→              <span
    91→                className={`${styles.loader} ${styles.semanticClassNames.loader}`}
    92→              />
    93→            )}
    94→
    95→            {state === 'error' && (
    96→              <span
    97→                className={`${styles.errorBadge} ${styles.semanticClassNames.errorBadge}`}
    98→              >

The `editToolbar` has `zIndex: 20`. The `editPanel` (the popover content) doesn't have a z-index set. The Popover from `@haklex/rich-editor-ui` likely uses a portal or a relatively positioned element.


Looking more closely at the screenshot, the toolbar is floating above the text content while the replace popover sits below it. The real issue is that the popover panel needs a higher z-index than the toolbar's 20 to properly layer on top. I think the issue is that the toolbar's z-index of 20 is sitting on top of the popover panel, which doesn't have a z-index set, so the toolbar is partially obscuring the popover. I need to add a higher z-index to the editPanel to make sure it appears above the toolbar.

     1→import {
     2→  Dialog,
     3→  DialogPopup,
     4→  DialogTitle,
     5→  SegmentedControl,
     6→} from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     7→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     8→import { DRAG_DROP_PASTE } from '@lexical/rich-text'
     9→import {
    10→  $insertNodes,
    11→  COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR,
    12→  COMMAND_PRIORITY_HIGH,
    13→  PASTE_COMMAND,
    14→} from 'lexical'
    15→import { Check, Info, Link2, Upload } from 'lucide-react'
    16→import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react'
    17→
    18→import { $createImageNode } from '../nodes/ImageNode'
    19→import { computeImageMeta } from '../utils/thumbhash'
    20→import * as css from './image-upload.css'
    21→import { OPEN_IMAGE_UPLOAD_DIALOG_COMMAND } from './image-upload-command'
    22→
    23→export interface ImageUploadResult {
    24→  src: string
    25→  altText?: string
    26→  width?: number
    27→  height?: number
    28→  thumbhash?: string
    29→}
    30→
    31→export type ImageUploadFn = (file: File) => Promise<ImageUploadResult>
    32→
    33→function isImageFile(file: File): boolean {
    34→  return file.type.startsWith('image/')
    35→}
    36→
    37→function hasImageData(dataTransfer: DataTransfer | null): boolean {
    38→  if (!dataTransfer) return false
    39→
    40→  if (Array.from(dataTransfer.files).some(isImageFile)) return true
    41→  return Array.from(dataTransfer.items).some((item) =>
    42→    item.type.startsWith('image/'),
    43→  )
    44→}
    45→
    46→function isSafeImageUrl(url: string): boolean {
    47→  return !/^(?:javascript\s*:|vbscript\s*:|data\s*:(?!image\/))/i.test(url)
    48→}
    49→
    50→function loadImageByUrl(
    51→  src: string,
    52→): Promise<{ width: number; height: number }> {
    53→  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    54→    const image = new Image()
    55→    image.onload = () => {
    56→      resolve({
    57→        width: image.naturalWidth || image.width,
    58→        height: image.naturalHeight || image.height,
    59→      })
    60→    }
    61→    image.onerror = () => reject(new Error('Failed to load image'))
    62→    image.src = src
    63→  })
    64→}
    65→
    66→function readAsDataUrl(file: File): Promise<string> {
    67→  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    68→    const reader = new FileReader()
    69→    reader.onload = () => resolve(String(reader.result))
    70→    reader.onerror = () => reject(reader.error ?? new Error('File read failed'))
    71→    reader.readAsDataURL(file)
    72→  })
    73→}
    74→
    75→export async function defaultImageUpload(
    76→  file: File,
    77→): Promise<ImageUploadResult> {
    78→  return {
    79→    src: await readAsDataUrl(file),
    80→    altText: file.name,
    81→  }
    82→}
    83→
    84→interface ImageUploadPluginProps {
    85→  onUpload: ImageUploadFn
    86→}
    87→
    88→export function ImageUploadPlugin({ onUpload }: ImageUploadPluginProps) {
    89→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    90→  const uploadRef = useRef(onUpload)
    91→  uploadRef.current = onUpload
    92→  const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null)
    93→  const toastTimerRef = useRef<number | null>(null)
    94→
    95→  const [dialogOpen, setDialogOpen] = useState(false)
    96→  const [tab, setTab] = useState<'upload' | 'url'>('upload')
    97→  const [rootDragActive, setRootDragActive] = useState(false)
    98→  const [dialogDragActive, setDialogDragActive] = useState(false)
    99→  const [pendingUploads, setPendingUploads] = useState(0)
   100→  const [dialogUploading, setDialogUploading] = useState(false)
   101→  const [toast, setToast] = useState<null | {
   102→    kind: 'success' | 'error'
   103→    message: string
   104→  }>(null)
   105→
   106→  const [urlInput, setUrlInput] = useState('')
   107→  const [urlPreview, setUrlPreview] = useState<string | null>(null)
   108→  const [urlMeta, setUrlMeta] = useState<{
   109→    width: number
   110→    height: number
   111→  } | null>(null)
   112→  const [urlLoading, setUrlLoading] = useState(false)
   113→  const [urlError, setUrlError] = useState<string | null>(null)
   114→
   115→  const tabItems = useMemo(
   116→    () => [
   117→      { value: 'upload' as const, label: 'Upload' },
   118→      { value: 'url' as const, label: 'URL' },
   119→    ],
   120→    [],
   121→  )
   122→
   123→  const pushToast = useCallback(
   124→    (kind: 'success' | 'error', message: string) => {
   125→      setToast({ kind, message })
   126→      if (toastTimerRef.current) {
   127→        window.clearTimeout(toastTimerRef.current)
   128→      }
   129→      toastTimerRef.current = window.setTimeout(() => setToast(null), 2200)
   130→    },
   131→    [],
   132→  )
   133→
   134→  const insertByUpload = useCallback(
   135→    async (file: File, options?: { closeDialog?: boolean }) => {
   136→      if (!isImageFile(file)) return false
   137→
   138→      const closeDialog = Boolean(options?.closeDialog)
   139→
   140→      setPendingUploads((value) => value + 1)
   141→      if (closeDialog) setDialogUploading(true)
   142→
   143→      try {
   144→        const [result, meta] = await Promise.all([
   145→          uploadRef.current(file),
   146→          computeImageMeta(file),
   147→        ])
   148→
   149→        editor.update(() => {
   150→          const node = $createImageNode({
   151→            src: result.src,
   152→            altText: result.altText ?? file.name,
   153→            width: result.width ?? meta.width,
   154→            height: result.height ?? meta.height,
   155→            thumbhash: result.thumbhash ?? meta.thumbhash,
   156→          })
   157→          $insertNodes([node])
   158→        })
   159→
   160→        if (closeDialog) {
   161→          setDialogOpen(false)
   162→          setUrlInput('')
   163→          setUrlPreview(null)
   164→          setUrlMeta(null)
   165→          setUrlError(null)
   166→        }
   167→        pushToast('success', 'Image uploaded')
   168→        return true
   169→      } catch (err: unknown) {
   170→        console.error('[ImageUploadPlugin]', err)
   171→        pushToast('error', 'Image upload failed')
   172→        return false
   173→      } finally {
   174→        setPendingUploads((value) => Math.max(value - 1, 0))
   175→        setDialogUploading(false)
   176→      }
   177→    },
   178→    [editor, pushToast],
   179→  )
   180→
   181→  const handleFiles = useCallback(
   182→    (files: File[]): boolean => {
   183→      const images = files.filter(isImageFile)
   184→      if (images.length === 0) return false
   185→
   186→      for (const file of images) {
   187→        void insertByUpload(file)
   188→      }
   189→      return true
   190→    },
   191→    [insertByUpload],
   192→  )
   193→
   194→  useEffect(() => {
   195→    const unregisterDragDrop = editor.registerCommand(
   196→      DRAG_DROP_PASTE,
   197→      (files: File[]) => handleFiles(files),
   198→      COMMAND_PRIORITY_HIGH,
   199→    )
   200→
   201→    const unregisterPaste = editor.registerCommand(
   202→      PASTE_COMMAND,
   203→      (event: ClipboardEvent | InputEvent | KeyboardEvent) => {
   204→        const clipboardData =
   205→          'clipboardData' in event
   206→            ? (event as ClipboardEvent).clipboardData
   207→            : null
   208→        if (!clipboardData) return false
   209→
   210→        const files = Array.from(clipboardData.files)
   211→        if (files.some(isImageFile)) {
   212→          return handleFiles(files)
   213→        }
   214→        return false
   215→      },
   216→      COMMAND_PRIORITY_HIGH,
   217→    )
   218→
   219→    const unregisterOpenDialog = editor.registerCommand(
   220→      OPEN_IMAGE_UPLOAD_DIALOG_COMMAND,
   221→      () => {
   222→        setDialogOpen(true)
   223→        return true
   224→      },
   225→      COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR,
   226→    )
   227→
   228→    const rootElement = editor.getRootElement()
   229→    const wrapper = rootElement?.parentElement ?? null
   230→    if (!wrapper) {
   231→      return () => {
   232→        unregisterDragDrop()
   233→        unregisterPaste()
   234→        unregisterOpenDialog()
   235→      }
   236→    }
   237→
   238→    let dragCounter = 0
   239→
   240→    const setWrapperDragging = (next: boolean) => {
   241→      setRootDragActive(next)
   242→      wrapper.classList.toggle(css.draggingWrapperClass, next)
   243→    }
   244→
   245→    const onDragEnter = (event: DragEvent) => {
   246→      if (!hasImageData(event.dataTransfer)) return
   247→      dragCounter += 1
   248→      setWrapperDragging(true)
   249→    }
   250→
   251→    const onDragOver = (event: DragEvent) => {
   252→      if (!hasImageData(event.dataTransfer)) return
   253→      event.preventDefault()
   254→    }
   255→
   256→    const onDragLeave = () => {
   257→      dragCounter = Math.max(dragCounter - 1, 0)
   258→      if (dragCounter === 0) {
   259→        setWrapperDragging(false)
   260→      }
   261→    }
   262→
   263→    const onDrop = () => {
   264→      dragCounter = 0
   265→      setWrapperDragging(false)
   266→    }
   267→
   268→    rootElement?.addEventListener('dragenter', onDragEnter)
   269→    rootElement?.addEventListener('dragover', onDragOver)
   270→    rootElement?.addEventListener('dragleave', onDragLeave)
   271→    rootElement?.addEventListener('drop', onDrop)
   272→
   273→    return () => {
   274→      if (toastTimerRef.current) {
   275→        window.clearTimeout(toastTimerRef.current)
   276→      }
   277→      unregisterDragDrop()
   278→      unregisterPaste()
   279→      unregisterOpenDialog()
   280→      setWrapperDragging(false)
   281→      rootElement?.removeEventListener('dragenter', onDragEnter)
   282→      rootElement?.removeEventListener('dragover', onDragOver)
   283→      rootElement?.removeEventListener('dragleave', onDragLeave)
   284→      rootElement?.removeEventListener('drop', onDrop)
   285→    }
   286→  }, [editor, handleFiles])
   287→
   288→  const resetUrlState = useCallback(() => {
   289→    setUrlInput('')
   290→    setUrlPreview(null)
   291→    setUrlMeta(null)
   292→    setUrlError(null)
   293→    setUrlLoading(false)
   294→  }, [])
   295→
   296→  const handleDialogFile = useCallback(
   297→    async (file: File | null) => {
   298→      if (!file) return
   299→      await insertByUpload(file, { closeDialog: true })
   300→    },
   301→    [insertByUpload],
   302→  )
   303→
   304→  const handleUrlPreview = useCallback(async () => {
   305→    const nextUrl = urlInput.trim()
   306→    if (!nextUrl) return
   307→    if (!isSafeImageUrl(nextUrl)) {
   308→      setUrlError('Unsupported URL scheme')
   309→      return
   310→    }
   311→
   312→    setUrlLoading(true)
   313→    setUrlError(null)
   314→    try {
   315→      const meta = await loadImageByUrl(nextUrl)
   316→      setUrlMeta(meta)
   317→      setUrlPreview(nextUrl)
   318→    } catch {
   319→      setUrlPreview(null)
   320→      setUrlMeta(null)
   321→      setUrlError('Could not load this image URL')
   322→    } finally {
   323→      setUrlLoading(false)
   324→    }
   325→  }, [urlInput])
   326→
   327→  const handleInsertByUrl = useCallback(() => {
   328→    if (!urlPreview || !isSafeImageUrl(urlPreview)) return
   329→
   330→    editor.update(() => {
   331→      const node = $createImageNode({
   332→        src: urlPreview,
   333→        altText: '',
   334→        width: urlMeta?.width,
   335→        height: urlMeta?.height,
   336→      })
   337→      $insertNodes([node])
   338→    })
   339→    pushToast('success', 'Image inserted')
   340→    setDialogOpen(false)
   341→    resetUrlState()
   342→  }, [editor, pushToast, resetUrlState, urlMeta, urlPreview])
   343→
   344→  const helperMessage =
   345→    pendingUploads > 0
   346→      ? `Uploading ${pendingUploads} image${pendingUploads > 1 ? 's' : ''}...`
   347→      : rootDragActive
   348→        ? 'Drop image files to upload'
   349→        : null
   350→
   351→  return (
   352→    <>
   353→      {(helperMessage || toast) && (
   354→        <div className={css.toastStack}>
   355→          {helperMessage && (
   356→            <div className={`${css.toast} ${css.toastVariant.info}`}>
   357→              <span className={css.spinner} />
   358→              {helperMessage}
   359→            </div>
   360→          )}
   361→          {toast && (
   362→            <div className={`${css.toast} ${css.toastVariant[toast.kind]}`}>
   363→              {toast.kind === 'success' ? (
   364→                <Check size={12} />
   365→              ) : (
   366→                <Info size={12} />
   367→              )}
   368→              {toast.message}
   369→            </div>
   370→          )}
   371→        </div>
   372→      )}
   373→
   374→      <Dialog
   375→        open={dialogOpen}
   376→        onOpenChange={(nextOpen) => {
   377→          if (!nextOpen && dialogUploading) return
   378→          setDialogOpen(nextOpen)
   379→          if (!nextOpen) {
   380→            resetUrlState()
   381→            setDialogUploading(false)
   382→            setDialogDragActive(false)
   383→          }
   384→        }}
   385→      >
   386→        <DialogPopup
   387→          className={css.dialogPopup}
   388→          showCloseButton={!dialogUploading}
   389→        >
   390→          <div className={css.dialogHeader}>
   391→            <DialogTitle className={css.dialogTitle}>Insert image</DialogTitle>
   392→          </div>
   393→
   394→          <div className={css.dialogBody}>
   395→            <div className={css.tabWrap}>
   396→              <SegmentedControl
   397→                items={tabItems}
   398→                value={tab}
   399→                onChange={setTab}
   400→                fullWidth
   401→              />
   402→            </div>
   403→
   404→            {tab === 'upload' ? (
   405→              <div
   406→                role="button"
   407→                tabIndex={0}
   408→                className={`${css.uploadDropzone} ${css.uploadDropzoneState[dialogUploading ? 'busy' : dialogDragActive ? 'active' : 'idle']}`}
   409→                onClick={() => {
   410→                  if (!dialogUploading) fileInputRef.current?.click()
   411→                }}
   412→                onKeyDown={(event) => {
   413→                  if (event.key !== 'Enter' && event.key !== ' ') return
   414→                  event.preventDefault()
   415→                  if (!dialogUploading) fileInputRef.current?.click()
   416→                }}
   417→                onDragEnter={(event) => {
   418→                  if (hasImageData(event.dataTransfer)) {
   419→                    event.preventDefault()
   420→                    setDialogDragActive(true)
   421→                  }
   422→                }}
   423→                onDragOver={(event) => {
   424→                  if (hasImageData(event.dataTransfer)) {
   425→                    event.preventDefault()
   426→                  }
   427→                }}
   428→                onDragLeave={() => setDialogDragActive(false)}
   429→                onDrop={(event) => {
   430→                  event.preventDefault()
   431→                  setDialogDragActive(false)
   432→                  const file = Array.from(event.dataTransfer.files).find(
   433→                    isImageFile,
   434→                  )
   435→                  void handleDialogFile(file ?? null)
   436→                }}
   437→              >
   438→                <input
   439→                  ref={fileInputRef}
   440→                  className={css.hiddenInput}
   441→                  type="file"
   442→                  accept="image/*"
   443→                  onChange={(event) => {
   444→                    const file = event.currentTarget.files?.[0] ?? null
   445→                    void handleDialogFile(file)
   446→                    event.currentTarget.value = ''
   447→                  }}
   448→                />
   449→
   450→                {dialogUploading ? (
   451→                  <div className={css.uploadBusyWrap}>
   452→                    <div className={css.uploadProgress}>
   453→                      <span className={css.spinner} />
   454→                      Uploading image...
   455→                    </div>
   456→                  </div>
   457→                ) : (
   458→                  <>
   459→                    <span className={css.uploadDropIcon}>
   460→                      <Upload size={18} />
   461→                    </span>
   462→                    <span className={css.uploadDropTitle}>
   463→                      Click to upload or drag and drop
   464→                    </span>
   465→                    <span className={css.uploadDropDesc}>
   466→                      PNG, JPG, GIF, WebP
   467→                    </span>
   468→                  </>
   469→                )}
   470→              </div>
   471→            ) : (
   472→              <>
   473→                <div className={css.urlInputRow}>
   474→                  <input
   475→                    className={css.textInput}
   476→                    type="url"
   477→                    placeholder="https://example.com/image.jpg"
   478→                    value={urlInput}
   479→                    onChange={(event) => {
   480→                      setUrlInput(event.target.value)
   481→                      setUrlError(null)
   482→                      setUrlPreview(null)
   483→                      setUrlMeta(null)
   484→                    }}
   485→                    onKeyDown={(event) => {

   487→                        event.preventDefault()
   488→                        if (urlPreview) {

   490→                        } else {

   492→                        }
   493→                      }
   494→                    }}
   495→                  />
   496→                  <button
   497→                    type="button"
   498→                    className={css.secondaryButton}
   499→                    disabled={urlLoading || !urlInput.trim()}
   500→                    onClick={() => void handleUrlPreview()}
   501→                  >
   502→                    {urlLoading ? 'Loading' : 'Preview'}
   503→                  </button>
   504→                  <button
   505→                    type="button"
   506→                    className={css.actionButton}
   507→                    disabled={!urlPreview}
   508→                    onClick={handleInsertByUrl}
   509→                  >
   510→                    Insert
   511→                  </button>
   512→                </div>
   513→
   514→                {urlError && (
   515→                  <span
   516→                    className={`${css.helperText} ${css.toastVariant.error}`}
   517→                  >
   518→                    <Info size={12} />
   519→                    {urlError}
   520→                  </span>
   521→                )}
   522→
   523→                {urlPreview && (
   524→                  <div className={css.urlPreview}>
   525→                    <img

    10→import { $getNearestNodeFromDOMNode } from 'lexical'
    11→import { useCallback } from 'react'
    12→
    13→import {
    14→  altTextAtom,
    15→  editAltTextAtom,
    16→  editCaptionAtom,
    17→  editSrcAtom,
    18→  metaOpenAtom,
    19→  replaceErrorAtom,
    20→  replaceLoadingAtom,
    21→  replaceMetaAtom,

    30→function isSafeImageSrc(src: string): boolean {
    31→  return !/^(?:javascript\s*:|vbscript\s*:|data\s*:(?!image\/))/i.test(src)
    32→}
    33→
    34→function readAsDataUrl(file: File): Promise<string> {
    35→  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    36→    const reader = new FileReader()
    37→    reader.onload = () => resolve(String(reader.result))
    38→    reader.onerror = () => reject(reader.error ?? new Error('File read failed'))
    39→    reader.readAsDataURL(file)
    40→  })
    41→}
    42→
    43→function loadImageByUrl(
    44→  src: string,
    45→): Promise<{ width: number; height: number }> {
    46→  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    47→    const image = new Image()
    48→    image.onload = () => {
    49→      resolve({
    50→        width: image.naturalWidth || image.width,
    51→        height: image.naturalHeight || image.height,
    52→      })
    53→    }
    54→    image.onerror = () => reject(new Error('Image load failed'))
    55→    image.src = src
    56→  })
    57→}
    58→
    59→export function useImageActions() {
    60→  const store = useStore()
    61→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    62→  const uploadImage = useImageUpload()
    63→
    64→  const withImageNode = useCallback(
    65→    (updater: (node: ReturnType<typeof $createImageNode>) => void) => {
    66→      const wrapperRef = store.get(wrapperRefAtom)
    67→      if (!wrapperRef.current) return
    68→      editor.update(() => {
    69→        const node = $getNearestNodeFromDOMNode(wrapperRef.current!)
    70→        if ($isImageNode(node)) updater(node)
    71→      })
    72→    },
    73→    [editor, store],
    74→  )
    75→
    76→  const closeReplacePanel = useCallback(() => {
    77→    store.set(replaceOpenAtom, false)
    78→    store.set(replaceModeAtom, 'upload')
    79→    store.set(replaceUrlAtom, '')
    80→    store.set(replacePreviewAtom, null)
    81→    store.set(replaceMetaAtom, null)
    82→    store.set(replaceLoadingAtom, false)
    83→    store.set(replaceErrorAtom, null)
    84→  }, [store])
    85→
    86→  const commitMeta = useCallback(() => {
    87→    const editSrc = store.get(editSrcAtom).trim()
    88→    if (!editSrc || !isSafeImageSrc(editSrc)) return
    89→    withImageNode((node) => {
    90→      node.setSrc(editSrc)
    91→      node.setAltText(store.get(editAltTextAtom).trim())
    92→      node.setCaption(store.get(editCaptionAtom).trim() || undefined)
    93→    })
    94→    store.set(metaOpenAtom, false)
    95→  }, [store, withImageNode])
    96→
    97→  const handleDelete = useCallback(() => {
    98→    const wrapperRef = store.get(wrapperRefAtom)
    99→    if (!wrapperRef.current) return
   100→    editor.update(() => {
   101→      const node = $getNearestNodeFromDOMNode(wrapperRef.current!)
   102→      if (node) node.remove()
   103→    })
   104→    store.set(metaOpenAtom, false)
   105→    closeReplacePanel()
   106→  }, [closeReplacePanel, editor, store])
   107→
   108→  const handleOpen = useCallback(() => {
   109→    const src = store.get(srcAtom)
   110→    if (src) window.open(src, '_blank', 'noopener,noreferrer')
   111→  }, [store])
   112→
   113→  const handleDownload = useCallback(() => {
   114→    const src = store.get(srcAtom)
   115→    if (!src) return
   116→    const link = document.createElement('a')
   117→    link.href = src
   118→    link.download = store.get(altTextAtom) || 'image'
   119→    link.click()
   120→  }, [store])
   121→
   122→  const handleDuplicate = useCallback(() => {
   123→    withImageNode((node) => {
   124→      const copy = $createImageNode({
   125→        src: node.getSrc(),
   126→        altText: node.getAltText(),
   127→        width: node.getWidth(),
   128→        height: node.getHeight(),
   129→        caption: node.getCaption(),
   130→        thumbhash: node.getThumbhash(),
   131→        accent: node.getAccent(),
   132→      })
   133→      node.insertAfter(copy)
   134→    })
   135→  }, [withImageNode])
   136→
   137→  const handleReplaceFile = useCallback(
   138→    async (file: File | null) => {
   139→      if (!file || !file.type.startsWith('image/')) return
   140→      store.set(replaceLoadingAtom, true)
   141→      store.set(replaceErrorAtom, null)
   142→      try {
   143→        const fallbackUploader: ImageUploadFn = async (nextFile) => ({
   144→          src: await readAsDataUrl(nextFile),
   145→          altText: nextFile.name,
   146→        })
   147→        const uploader = uploadImage ?? fallbackUploader
   148→        const [result, meta] = await Promise.all([
   149→          uploader(file),
   150→          computeImageMeta(file),
   151→        ])
   152→        withImageNode((node) => {
   153→          node.setSrc(result.src)
   154→          node.setAltText(result.altText ?? file.name)
   155→          node.setDimensions(
   156→            result.width ?? meta.width,
   157→            result.height ?? meta.height,
   158→          )
   159→          node.setThumbhash(result.thumbhash ?? meta.thumbhash)
   160→        })
   161→        closeReplacePanel()
   162→      } catch {
   163→        store.set(replaceErrorAtom, 'Failed to replace image')
   164→      } finally {
   165→        store.set(replaceLoadingAtom, false)
   166→      }
   167→    },
   168→    [closeReplacePanel, store, uploadImage, withImageNode],
   169→  )
   170→
   171→  const handlePreviewUrl = useCallback(async () => {
   172→    const url = store.get(replaceUrlAtom).trim()
   173→    if (!url || !isSafeImageSrc(url)) {
   174→      store.set(replaceErrorAtom, 'Invalid image URL')
   175→      return
   176→    }
   177→    store.set(replaceLoadingAtom, true)
   178→    store.set(replaceErrorAtom, null)
   179→    try {
   180→      const meta = await loadImageByUrl(url)
   181→      store.set(replacePreviewAtom, url)
   182→      store.set(replaceMetaAtom, meta)
   183→    } catch {
   184→      store.set(replacePreviewAtom, null)
   185→      store.set(replaceMetaAtom, null)
   186→      store.set(replaceErrorAtom, 'Image URL could not be loaded')
   187→    } finally {
   188→      store.set(replaceLoadingAtom, false)
   189→    }
   190→  }, [store])
   191→
   192→  const handleReplaceByUrl = useCallback(() => {
   193→    const preview = store.get(replacePreviewAtom)
   194→    if (!preview || !isSafeImageSrc(preview)) return
   195→    const meta = store.get(replaceMetaAtom)
   196→    withImageNode((node) => {
   197→      node.setSrc(preview)
   198→      node.setDimensions(meta?.width, meta?.height)
   199→      node.setThumbhash(undefined)
   200→    })
   201→    closeReplacePanel()
   202→  }, [closeReplacePanel, store, withImageNode])
   203→
   204→  const handleReplaceOpenChange = useCallback(
   205→    (nextOpen: boolean) => {
   206→      store.set(replaceOpenAtom, nextOpen)
   207→      if (!nextOpen) closeReplacePanel()
   208→    },
   209→    [closeReplacePanel, store],
   210→  )
   211→
   212→  return {
   213→    commitMeta,
   214→    closeReplacePanel,
   215→    handleReplaceFile,
   216→    handlePreviewUrl,
   217→    handleReplaceByUrl,
   218→    handleReplaceOpenChange,
   219→    handleOpen,
   220→    handleDuplicate,
   221→    handleDownload,
   222→    handleDelete,
   223→  }
   224→}
   225→

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/CLAUDE.md`

```text
     1→# CLAUDE.md
     2→
     3→This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.
     4→
     5→## Overview
     6→
     7→Lexical-based rich editor ecosystem. Modular packages: core editor, UI primitives, content renderers, plugins, and integration bundles.
     8→
     9→**Build**: Vite 6 + Vanilla Extract CSS-in-TS. ESM only (`.mjs`). TypeScript 5.9.
    10→
    11→## Terminology: Static / Edit Split
    12→
    13→The editor ecosystem splits both **nodes** and **renderers** into static (read-only) and edit (editor-only) variants for bundle optimization.
    14→
    15→### Four Concepts
    16→
    17→| Term | Layer | Purpose | Example |
    18→|------|-------|---------|---------|
    19→| **Static Node** | Lexical node class | Deserialize JSON + `decorate()` returns `RendererWrapper`. No edit UI imports. | `CodeBlockNode`, `AlertQuoteNode` |
    20→| **Edit Node** | Lexical node class | Extends static node, overrides `decorate()` to use edit decorator with heavy deps (Popover, NestedComposer, etc.) | `CodeBlockEditNode`, `AlertQuoteEditNode` |
    21→| **Static Renderer** | React component | Display-only rendering. No `@haklex/rich-editor-ui` or `lucide-react` imports. | `AlertRenderer`, `MermaidRenderer` |
    22→| **Edit Renderer** | React component | Adds edit UI (DropdownMenu, Popover, presentDialog). Imports `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`. | `AlertEditRenderer`, `MermaidEditRenderer` |
    23→
    24→### Bundle Optimization Strategy
    25→
    26→```
    27→RichRenderer (read-only display)          RichEditor (full editing)
    28→├── Static Nodes (config.ts)              ├── Edit Nodes (config.ts)
    29→├── Static Renderers                      ├── Edit Renderers
    30→│   (enhancedRendererConfig)              │   (enhancedEditRendererConfig)
    31→└── Zero edit UI deps                     └── Full edit UI deps
    32→```
    33→
    34→**Key principle**: `RichRenderer` entry imports only static nodes + static renderers, so bundlers tree-shake all edit UI deps (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`, `lucide-react`, `LexicalNestedComposer`). `RichEditor` entry imports edit nodes + edit renderers that bring in these deps.
    35→
    36→**Split criteria**: Only split when the edit path introduces heavy imports absent from the static path. If edit logic is just a boolean prop with no extra imports (e.g. CodeBlock's `editable`), no split needed.
    37→
    38→### Registration
    39→
    40→| Config file | Contains | Used by |
    41→|-------------|----------|---------|
    42→| `@haklex/rich-editor` `src/config.ts` | `customNodes` / `allNodes` (static) | `RichRenderer` |
    43→| `@haklex/rich-editor` `src/config-edit.ts` | `customEditNodes` / `allEditNodes` (edit) | `RichEditor` |
    44→| `@haklex/rich-renderers` `config.ts` | `enhancedRendererConfig` (static renderers) | `ShiroRenderer` |
    45→| `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit` `config.ts` | `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (edit renderers) | `ShiroEditor` |
    46→
    47→## Package Dependency Graph
    48→
    49→```
    50→@haklex/rich-kit-shiro (integration bundle for web app)
```
</details></tool-use>

<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```md
# @haklex/rich-renderer-image

图片渲染器，支持 Thumbhash 模糊占位、灯箱预览和编辑器内图片管理。

## 安装

\```bash
pnpm add @haklex/rich-renderer-image @haklex/rich-editor
\```

## 导出

\```ts
export { ImageRenderer } from './ImageRenderer'
export { ImageEditRenderer } from './ImageEditRenderer'
\```

## 功能

- Thumbhash 模糊占位 + 渐显加载动画
- 图片灯箱（react-photo-view）
- 图片说明（caption）
- 加载 / 错误状态
- 编辑模式：替换、元信息编辑、复制、删除、下载

## 架构

\```
ImageRenderer          — 静态渲染（灯箱 + thumbhash）
ImageEditRenderer      — 编辑模式入口，mode !== 'editor' 时回退到 ImageRenderer
├── ImageEditContext    — Jotai Provider，管理编辑状态 atoms
├── ImageEditToolbar   — 悬浮工具栏（元信息 / 替换 / 打开 / 复制 / 下载 / 删除）
├── EditMetaPopover    — 编辑 src / alt / caption
├── ReplacePopover     — 替换图片（上传 / URL）
├── ReplacePanel       — Upload / URL 切换面板
├── useImageActions    — 所有编辑操作 hooks
└── atoms              — Jotai atoms（src, loadState, hovering, replace 状态等）
\```

## 使用

\```tsx
import { ImageRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-renderer-image'
import type { RendererConfig } from '@haklex/rich-editor'

// 静态渲染
const config: RendererConfig = {
  Image: ImageRenderer,
}

// 编辑模式
import { ImageEditRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-renderer-image'

const editConfig: RendererConfig = {
  Image: ImageEditRenderer,
}
\```

## 样式

Vanilla Extract CSS-in-TS。所有样式类通过 `semanticClassNames` 导出语义化 class 名，便于外部覆盖。

加载动画：img 初始 `opacity: 0`，加载完成后通过 `imageVisible` class 施加 `opacity: 1` + mask 渐显动画。

## 依赖

| 包 | 用途 |
|---|------|
| `@haklex/rich-editor` | 核心类型、节点操作、上传上下文 |
| `@haklex/rich-editor-ui` | Popover、SegmentedControl |
| `jotai` | 编辑状态管理 |
| `lucide-react` | 工具栏图标 |
| `react-photo-view` | 灯箱 |
| `thumbhash` | 模糊占位图解码 |

## License

MIT

```
